---
title: "DRIFT Tutorial"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE,warning=FALSE, message=FALSE,dpi=600)
```

This is a tutorial about how to use the DRIFT method.

### Packages Loading

If you haven’t install ‘DRIFT-main’ package, please use the following code:

```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(devtools)
install_github("aaaabbbb-jo/DRIFT-main")
```


```{r, eval=FALSE}
library(DRIFT-main)
```

### Data Generation

In our simulation part, we use function `Generate_data()` for data generation. Here is an example of data generation.

### ITE Estimation

Here we show how to compute ITE estimates using `R-Learner GEO`, `Factorized GEO`, `Obs Maximin`, and our proposed method `DRIFT` `DRIFT_N`, respectively. 

### Performance Evaluation

The performance of each method is evaluated by $ACC_{\min}$ and $Cor_{\min}$.
